english_gloss: to be dizzy, to feel giddy, to feel faint, to lose one's mind

sentences.note: He's dizzy, he should rest at hospital
Watch out if you feel dizzy
He asked for help because he felt dizzy

recall_prompts.prompt: Hızlı dönerken veya korkudan vücudun dengesini kaybetmek ne demek?
Çok ender kalp atışından hissedilen sersemlik durumu ne demek?
